Hoshinova Materials KK Privacy and Insider-Information Handling Notice under APPI and FIEA (Japan).
Controller: Hoshinova Materials KK; Data Protection Officer: Ms. Reina Okabe; contact privacy@hoshinova.example.jp for inquiries and DSARs.
Categories collected: employee identifiers, work contact details, access logs; Individual Number (My Number) solely for payroll/tax; crypto-asset wallet IDs only for a limited pilot settlement test with Midori Grid GK.
Purpose limitation and security: processing for HR, board (取締役会) governance, and securities compliance; My Number stored separately with strict role-based access and encryption in Japan.
Insider-list workflow: upon approval of a non-binding LOI to acquire Sango Robotics KK, the Secretariat created and maintained an insider list (氏名・役職・連絡先・記録時刻); no external sharing until required stock exchange disclosure in Tokyo.
MNPI safeguards: information barriers (情報遮断措置) segregate the M&A clean team from treasury and trading; pre-clearance required, and blackout windows apply from quarter-end to earnings release and during deal diligence; tipping or selective disclosure is prohibited under FIEA.
Cyber incident signal: on 2026-05-14 the CISO notified the board of a suspected zero-day affecting the vendor data room; treated as potential MNPI until confirmed and handled per competent authority guidance.
Crypto/ESG signal: the board is evaluating a private issuance of renewable-energy-linked tokens and a Scope 3 transition-linked loan with contingent coupon; commercial terms (price grid and step-up triggers) are in draft and confidential.
Commercial term handling: draft SPA earnout thresholds and termination fee ranges classified internal level R-3; no uploads to marketing drives; data room access is logged and reviewed.
Employee notice: training materials explain insider lists and define crypto-assets for general awareness; they do not contain, and must not be used to infer, any deal-stage or undisclosed information.
DSAR workflow: submit access/correction requests to privacy@hoshinova.example.jp stating your relationship (employee/vendor/shareholder); identity verified via employee number or shareholder registry reference; never email copies of My Number.
Retention: insider lists and MNPI records retained 7 years after public disclosure; My Number retained per statute then securely erased; crypto pilot wallet IDs purged 90 days after test completion.
Cross-border transfers: routine processors include KumoriByte KK (JP) and Seika Delta Pte. Ltd. (SG) under APPI Article 28 representations; transfer records and recipient safeguards are available on request.
Contact point: Corporate Secretary Mr. Daichi Fujimori will acknowledge complaints within 5 business days; unresolved matters may be escalated to the local data protection authority in Japan.
